feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to move Cross container HANA Cloud artifacts to Quality space in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have created a calculation view where we have a cross container access to different HDI container and we have created all required config files to connect and it worked well in Dev space and deployment also successful.

Now when we tried to move to Quality space and we are using CTMS in BTP to move to Quality.
We are getting below error while moving to quality space.


"Async operation for service binding between app "zcom__xxxdb1-deployer" and service instance "zcom_XXX-db2" failed with "10009 CF-UnableToPerform bind could not be completed: VCAP::CloudController::V3::LastOperationFailedState".

Any help will be appreciated. Thank you.
 Please find the attached error screenshot for your reference.

entry.title: Hybrid LOB: INSERT/UPSERT Performance
entry.content:
Dear HANA Experts,

i am considering converting some VARBINARY Columns to Hybrid LOB and i am curious on the performance impact for WRITE operations. For READ it is clear to me that all LOB Data bigger some threshold (>1KB in default) is stored on Disk. So there is some I/O overhead for this.

But for the WRITE Performance, i am not sure: is there some additionally WRITE I/O for INSERT/UPSERT necessary, besides the usual sync. commit on LOG disk? is for Hybrid LOB delta store in use? 

My concern originates from SAP note 2000002, point 10: "Increased runtime of INSERT operation on table with hybrid LOB field" -> "INSERTs in hybrid LOBs have to perform disk I/O if the configured memory threshold is exceeded and the data is stored in a disk LOB."

I hope some Experts here in the HANA community can help me with this.

Thank you very much

BR Dominik

entry.title: How to perform Remote Table Replication if the HDI Container is created from Kyma Environment?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to perform Remote Table Replication and have successfully achieved this in the Cloud Foundry environment. However, my main goal is to perform the same for an HDI Container created in the Kyma environment.

The challenge I’m facing is that in the SAP HANA Cloud Database, when I navigate to Add Instance > HDI Container, I can only see containers created in the Cloud Foundry environment. The containers created in the Kyma environment are not visible, which eventually prevents me from setting up Virtual Tables and Remote Subscriptions.

Could you please guide me on how to achieve this?

Thanks,
Abhinav

entry.title: How to use GOS attachment URL in CDS view
entry.content:
I want to use GOS attachment URL in CDS View.

However, URL attached in GOS is stored in SOFFCONT1 as binery data, so that it cannot be used directly.

1, Can I use Function Module in CDS View?
    CDS View is used by DataSphere, so maybe I cannot use Virtual Element.

2, Is there any table that store URL text as text data?

entry.title: INVOICE STANDARD PURCHASE ORDER PER JOB
entry.content:
Hello,
In SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public, when I launch an invoicing job: shedule supplier invoice Jobs - advance, in order to perform a bulk invoicing of orders,

the standard orders are not invoiced to me.

Do you know what this could be due to and how it can massively bill standard orders through some job?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: Print Slip Goods Receipt
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Is there any possibility to make tick automatically for print GR slip in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

 Thank you!!!

#SAPS4HanaCLoudPublicEdition

#Procurement

entry.title: Table for Gate entry
entry.content: Hello SAP Experts, I need your guidance regarding tables in SAP that store gate entry details. I currently have a GRN report, but if a gate entry report is unavailable, I would like to develop a report for gate entries that have been passed but where GRN is not done. Additionally, please suggest if there are any alternative standard reports available for this purpose. Thank you!

entry.title: unable to visualize Heterogenous graph in sap hana . Getting error as "GRAPH_WORKSPACE_HETERO_NOT_SU
entry.content:
I have created a Heterogenous graph workspace in my sap hana cloud db . 
however when i try to visaulize the same from the UI i am getting this exception .

"an exception (error) occurred "GRAPH_WORKSPACE_HETERO_NOT_SUPPORTED" 

  

Following is the schema i have used 

 

 

 CREATE SCHEMA SK_GRAPH_SCHEMA2; SET SCHEMA SK_GRAPH_SCHEMA2; CREATE COLUMN TABLE user_table ( user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT, location VARCHAR(255) ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE post_table ( post_id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE comment_table ( comment_id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE friend_table ( friendship_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user1_id INT NOT NULL, user2_id INT NOT NULL, since DATE ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE posted_table ( post_id INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE commented_on_table ( comment_id INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, post_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL ); CREATE GRAPH WORKSPACE "social_network" EDGE TABLE friend_table KEY COLUMN "FRIENDSHIP_ID" SOURCE COLUMN "USER1_ID" REFERENCES "USER_TABLE" TARGET COLUMN "USER2_ID" REFERENCES "USER_TABLE" VERTEX TABLE "USER_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "USER_ID" EDGE TABLE "POSTED_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "POST_ID" SOURCE COLUMN "USER_ID" REFERENCES "POST_TABLE" TARGET COLUMN "POST_ID" REFERENCES "POST_TABLE" VERTEX TABLE "POST_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "POST_ID" EDGE TABLE "COMMENTED_ON_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "COMMENT_ID" SOURCE COLUMN "USER_ID" REFERENCES "COMMENT_TABLE" TARGET COLUMN "POST_ID" REFERENCES "COMMENT_TABLE" VERTEX TABLE "COMMENT_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "COMMENT_ID"; 

 

Please advise whether this kind of graph are supported in sap hana graph or what do i need to change?

entry.title: Automate CAPM application deployment from one space to other space
entry.content:
Hello Team,
i'm trying to automate CAPM deployment from one space to other space in cloudfoundry environment using terraform , we have a code in github and we build and deployed to one space using cf commands ,
same application can we deploy into other space , without touching github and build is there any way like clone space, by using terraform datasources we are able to fetch entitlements, subscriptions, and service instances,  and created resources in another space, same way can we fetch deployed application from one space and deploy to other space..?

entry.title: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are experiencing issues with our HANA Cloud instance in BTP today.

We attempted to start the HANA instance using SAP HANA Cloud Central, but we are unable to start it at the moment.

Has anyone else faced a similar issue? Any insights or workarounds would be appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Print file zebra with SAP
entry.content:
How to print a .prn file (or .zpl Zebra) with abap SAP (smartforms, adobeform, etc..)?

Help me

entry.title: Can I configure an external or third-party SFTP server in SAP SuccessFactors Integration Center
entry.content:
Can I configure an external or third-party SFTP server in SAP SuccessFactors Integration Center to schedule a job for importing or exporting the Talent Intelligence Hub Attributes Library?

We are trying to schedule a job in Integration Center using an Azure Blob Storage-based SFTP server, but we are unable to establish a connection.

 Also we tried few others server as well and we faced the same issue.

We have created SFTP server as mentioned at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/blobs/secure-file-transfer-protocol-support

entry.title: Extract the Report from SAP into Excel file
entry.content:
Hello All,

I require to interact with SAP and download the report from SAP. I am currently automating the SAP GUI to generate report from SAP by using Excel VBA Script. But, It took lot of time to complete the report extraction. 

Is there any way to get the reports from SAP without disturbing the foreground on the system ?

entry.title: How to Calculate/Filter Aggregation of Measures for different hierarchy subtotals in SAC/HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

It is a long post but I want to give all details to explain clearly what we try to achieve.

We are preparing a sales report that contains a three-level category hierarchy.

  • Data Source: HANA Cloud Calculation View
  • Connection Type: Live Connection
  • Hierarchy Type: Level-Based Hierarchy
  • Story Type: Optimized Story
  • Component Type to Represent Data in the Story: Table, KPI Tile (Numeric Point)

Context

To briefly explain the context, consider the sales of a retail store where multiple products from different categories are sold within a single transaction (check). Our objective is to analyze:

  • The sales quantity and amount of these products, and
  • The number of checks in which these products appear, along with the total sales amount of those checks.

We have four main measures:

  1. Number of Items Sold: Represents the number of products sold. 
  2. Number of Checks: Shows the number of distinct checks (transactions) in which a specific product has been sold.
  3. Sales Amount of the Item: Displays the total sales amount of a product across different checks.
  4. Total Sales Amount of Checks: Displays the total amount of the checks that include that specific product. – WE HAVE A PROBLEM WITH THIS MEASURE
    • (According to the example in the screenshot, product P001 has been sold in checks 1001, 1002, and 1003. This measure sums the total sales amounts of these three checks, including all other products sold in those transactions. You can analyze this further in the attached screenshot )

The Challenge/Problem

The total sales amount of items sold and the total sales amount of the checks containing these products must match at the total row.

Since same check may contain different products, the challenge arises when displaying the data in a table:

  • The Total Sales Amount of Checks column gets summed across multiple occurrences, causing double counting. If different products are in the same check, since the table contains product level data, this measure shows total sales amount of that check in 2 different row and sums these values at total node.

What possible solutions can be implemented in HANA Cloud Calculation View or SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to handle this requirement correctly?

Looking forward to your support. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Datasphere Internal error: SQL View - Resource governor for 'cursors' exceeded
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have define an SQL View which uses a few local table variables to split up the logic and returns a union of these temporary tables.

Whenever I attempt to preview the result, I run into the following error:

internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database <DWC_BWBRIDGESPACE.BWBRIDGE> [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;403 internal error: An error occurred while opening the cursor for the remote database. The server name: "DWCHDL2" [SAP][ODBC Driver][SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine]Resource governor for 'cursors' exceededThe problematic query: "SELECT

If return each of table variables on their own, the error doesn't appear and I can preview the data just fine.How can I debug this further? Is there a parameter I can check to see where the issue may be coming from?

entry.title: Datasphere: Table Function - Union with Tuple instead of a Table
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm creating a SQL-based View in Datasphere. I have a requirement to create multiple versions from the same record I'm looping over. I have inititalized a table variable to hold my result and have created a cursor over my source table. Based on each iteration, I manually create the tuple that I would like to insert as my new record. The issue that I'm facing is appending to my result table. I want to overwrite my result table as the union of itself with the new record, but the syntax check fails as a "from" clause is expected implying that I have to use a table. I know that what I'm trying to achieve is possible on other DBs and SQL flavors but cannot seem to find the equivalent on HANA. Any ideas? I have attached a screenshot of the code snippet.

Thanks!

entry.title: 在维护“设置支付事务的银行确定”时，银行子账户不能维护，保存后为空
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance##在维护“设置支付事务的银行确定”时，银行子账户不能维护，保存后为空

entry.title: SAP CAP Node.js - Insert vector embedding data into hana cloud is not working
entry.content:
Hello, everyone,

I referred these two links cap-ai-vector-engine-sample ,cap-llm-plugin-samples  to develop a CAP RAG application.

When I insert the embedding data into the db, I got an error message "argument type mismatch: Result is not a single value".

After my research, I found that if the dependency @SAP/cds-hana is added, data can be inserted into the database successfully, However, my App use Fiori elements and enbaled draft function, if the @SAP/cds-hana dependency is used, my Fiori app will encounter an error: SqlError: invalid column name: DRAFTADMINISTRATIVEDATA.INPROCESSBYUSER. When this dependency is removed, the Fiori app will not report an error, but I won't be able to insert data into the db. It seems that this is a dilemma, So, is there a conflict between @SAP/cds-hana and the draft-enabled function?  And is there any way to insert data into the db normally without using this dependency?

Any advice or suggestions would be appreciated.

schema.cds

entity DocumentChunk : cuid, managed {
    file            : Association to Files;
    text_chunk      : LargeString;
    metadata_column : LargeString;
    embedding       : Vector(1536);
}

service.js ( insert into db )

const embeddingResult = await capllmplugin.getEmbeddingWithConfig(
          embeddingModelConfig,
          chunk.pageContent
        );

embedding = embeddingResult?.data[0]?.embedding;

const entry = {
          file_ID: uuid,
          text_chunk: chunk.pageContent,
          metadata_column: fileName,
          embedding: array2VectorBuffer(embedding),
        };
textChunkEntries.push(entry);

// Insert the text chunk with embeddings into db
      const insertStatus = await INSERT.into(DocumentChunk).entries(
        textChunkEntries
      );

package.json

 "dependencies": {
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "3.25.0",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "3.25.0",
    "@sap/cds": "^8",
    "@cap-js/hana": "^1",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "cap-llm-plugin": "^1.4.4",
    "express": "^4",
    "langchain": "^0.1.19",
  }

entry.title: HANA Cloud - cannot change Update Mode
entry.content: I am currently running two versions of HANA Cloud QRC3/2024 and QRC4/2024.  I would like to change the default Update Mode of the instance to "Apply changes without a restart".  I can view the current default mode in SAP HANA Cloud Central's Overview -> Configuration page "Apply changes with a restart".  However when I click on Manage Configuration (upper right section of page), the "General" or any other page that appears does not have the Update Mode section to change.  From a security perspective, I have SAP HANA Cloud Administrator, SAP HAAN Cloud Security Adminstrator and Subaccount Administrator role collections.   I created the HANA Cloud instance so I would think I would be able to change the Update Mode.   I would appreciate any assistance that can be provided.
